productDisplayName: Fastrack Men Analog Steel Navy Blue Watch
description: Perfectly in sync with the style quotient, this analog wrist watch from fastrack is a great buy for those who enjoy performance in their accessories. With excellent touches, this watch makes for a fabulous and fashionable daily wear.Case diameter: 45 mmCase thickness: 5 mmDial shape: Round Steel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Steel strap with rubber inserts for comfort, easy bending of the strap and style Butterfly clasp to keep the watch firm in place as a belt buckle Navy Blue dial with hours marked from 1 to 5 in shadowed style, brand name marking 9 o& rsquo clock position with brand logo marking the 12 o& rsquo clock point, a separate dial near the 7 and 8 o& rsquo clock marking showing the seconds ticking away and date socket next to the 4 o& rsquo clock position Outer rim in white and orange marking the minutes with numbers written at every 10-minute duration Engraved time markers on the bezel Quartz movement of time display Screw to reset time and date Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance at 50 meters, allowing you to use it even when swimming
